doc_title_en: Response to Cost of Capital and Stock Price-Conscious Management (Update)

key_facts.method: Strategic plan revision and dividend commitment
key_facts.reason_jp: PBR が2期連続で1倍を下回っており、資本コスト低減と株価評価向上が目的

summary_en: Rheon updated its mid-term plan targets to operating margin 12.4%+ and ROE 8.5%+ (from prior levels), with strategic initiatives in revenue growth, production efficiency, and shareholder returns including 40%+ payout ratio and progressive dividends.
summary_jp: レオン自動機は中期経営計画の目標を営業利益率12.4%以上、ROE 8.5%以上に修正し、収益力向上と配当性向40%以上の株主還元を推進する。
tag_en: Cost of Capital Initiative · ROE 8.5%+ (modified target) · PBR improvement focus · No immediate capital action
tag_jp: 資本コスト意識経営 · ROE 8.5%以上目標 · PBR改善推進 · 配当性向40%以上
